form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.26) when sixth over 295m at this track in a Class 3. Has four successes and 12 minors from 26 starts from box 2. Key chance and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 4.5 lengths second but did clock an exceptional 17.03 over the 295m journey. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 295m. Ignore last start. Has ability and among the chances.

form.formComment: Looks close to another win after her success on March 13 at this track over 295m. Last start was fourth over 295m in 17.33, behind Bellwood. Must include if she recaptures that form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Looks close to another win after her success on March 13 at this track over 295m. Last start was fourth over 295m in 17.33, behind Bellwood. Must include if she recaptures that form.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th over 295m at this track beaten 5 lengths (17.57) behind Rovaniemi in a Class 3 on March 26. Placed two back at this track. Comes through a good form race. Winning chance on that form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2 lengths over 295m at this track in a handy (17.13), beating Officer Ridley. Has ability and can run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 2 lengths over 295m at this track in a handy (17.13), beating Officer Ridley. Has ability and can run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Squeezed around bend, faltered and lost ground.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 295m at this track. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Class 3 on March 26 over 295m at this track behind Ripslinger Rayna, beaten 8 lengths (18.12). Needs it easier.
